abilities.name: Flirtatious Wink
abilities.text: When an enemy model within 6" heals, it may discard a card. If it does not, reduce the healing to 0 and this model heals that amount instead.

abilities.name: Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

actions.name: "Now, Kiss!"
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose a different enemy within 6" of the target.
actions.effects: Place the target into base contact with the chosen model. The target and the chosen model gain an Entranced token.

triggers.name: In Their Own World
triggers.text: The target and the chosen model gain a Craven token.

triggers.name: Love's Sting
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage.

actions.name: Unrequited Love
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose a different enemy within 6" of the target.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp towards the chosen model. Then, move the chosen model 3" directly away from the target.

actions.name: Prove Your Devotion
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Enemies within (aura)1" of the made marker must pass a TN 11 Wp duel or declare an attack action chosen and controlled by this model. Then, if this action did not receive a raise, remove the made marker.
